Analyst_Name: Name of the analyst who performed the analysis
Company_Name: Name of the company for which the analysis was done
Analysis_Month: The month and year when the analysis was done
Category: The specific category of products for which the analysis was done
Campaign_Type: Type of the campaign evaluated during the analysis
Click_Through_Rate: Percentage of the total audience that clicked on the campaign link
Sales_Lift: Percentage increase in sales during the month of the campaign
